what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named pitch-deck/p-17 in the design-source channel; it stores provenance (id, address, channel, path, source, author_session, created), a content-addressed blob reference, MIME type, zero dimensions, and a one-line body labeling the image as source design ground-truth.
observations: The file uses YAML frontmatter to record asset metadata for an image.
The image is identified as pitch-deck/p-17 in the design-source channel with address image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-17.
It references a JPEG blob via blob://b2:ee830c3ca3d2f693872c8f2981ad52a8.
Width and height are both recorded as 0.
The source field is design_source_material and the body calls it SOURCE design ground-truth.
The author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r and the created timestamp is 2026-06-22T11:31:01.157478+00:00.
The links array is empty and there are no code symbols.
standouts: Explicit 'SOURCE design ground-truth' provenance label in the body.
Image dimensions are 0x0 despite being an image/jpeg record.
Content-addressed blob reference with a hash-like suffix.
conventions: Follows a ledger metadata format with YAML frontmatter and a short body note.
Uses a URI-style address (image://design-source/...) and a blob:// URI for content addressing.
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset.
Breaks the usual expectation that image metadata includes actual width and height.
concerns: Width and height are zero, suggesting the image was not analyzed or the metadata is a placeholder.
links is empty, so no relationships to other assets or code are captured.
There is no caption, alt text, or content description for the image.
The body label is terse and does not describe what the pitch-deck page depicts.
notes: A sparse provenance stub for a pitch-deck image marked as design-source ground truth, with no dimensions and no linked relationships.
questions: Why are the width and height recorded as 0 for an image asset?
What visual content appears on pitch-deck/p-17.jpg?
Does the empty links array mean no relationships exist or that they were not extracted?
purpose_vs_actual: It is presented as a source design ground-truth record and does store provenance plus a blob pointer, but it contains almost no descriptive or structural information about the image itself.
apparent_themes: Separation of media blobs from descriptive records
intention_signals: The file appears to be registering a pitch-deck image as source material in the design channel so downstream interpretations can reference its stable blob and origin.
novelty: The body uses a typed provenance phrase ('SOURCE design ground-truth') instead of a caption, and the dimensions are explicitly set to zero rather than omitted.
contribution: It contributes a stable, content-addressed pointer and an authorship timestamp for a pitch-deck image asset, giving a fused system an anchor for the asset's identity and origin even when descriptive metadata is absent.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a ledger metadata record for a JPEG pitch-deck image asset in the design-source channel, containing a blob pointer, authorship timestamp, zero dimensions, and a 'SOURCE design ground-truth' label.
intention_for_embedding: It was intended to catalog a pitch-deck page image as design-source material with provenance and a stable content address.
